message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Terminal" as T1
participant "gosdk" as G1
participant "Terminal" as T2

T1->>G1: StakePoolPayInterests(blobberID)

G1->>T1: check initialized sdk

alt [empty blobber id]
    G1->>G1: get client id
    G1->>T1: create stake pool request
    G1->>T1: create smart contract txn data
    G1->>T1: send smart contract txn value fee
end

T2-->>G1: return
@enduml
